name: 道の駅 ウェルネスあらお
desc: 2026年6月開業、荒尾競馬場跡地に整備された九州最大規模の道の駅。直売所や飲食店、有明海を一望できるオープンテラスがあり、保健・福祉・子育て支援施設も併設する新しいタイプの道の駅。
descEn: Opened in June 2026 on the site of the former Arao Racecourse, this is one of Kyushu's largest roadside stations. Features a market, restaurants, an open terrace overlooking the Ariake Sea, and health, welfare, and childcare support facilities as part of a new style of roadside station.
